items.subTitle: Cells, Rows, and Columns
items.description: Understand how data is organized in cells, rows, and columns.

items.subTitle: Data Types
items.description: Recognize different data types such as text, numbers, dates, and formulas.

items.subTitle: Sheet Navigation
items.description: Learn to navigate between sheets and use shortcuts like Ctrl + Arrow keys to move around large datasets.

items.subTitle: Basic Formulas
items.description: Use simple formulas like SUM(), AVERAGE(), IF(), etc., to perform calculations.

items.subTitle: VLOOKUP and HLOOKUP
items.description: Use these functions to search for values across different sheets or tables.

items.subTitle: Conditional Functions
items.description: Use functions like IF() and COUNTIF() to apply conditions to data.

items.subTitle: Data Filtering
items.description: Learn to filter and sort data to view only relevant records.

items.subTitle: Data Validation
items.description: Use Excel's data validation features to ensure correct input, especially for dropdowns and restricted values.

items.subTitle: Data Formatting
items.description: Format cells to highlight important data or ensure consistency (e.g., date format, text wrap).

items.subTitle: Reading and Writing Data
items.description: Know how to use automation tools to read data from and write data to Excel files using libraries like Apache POI (Java) or openpyxl (Python).

items.subTitle: Excel Integration with Test Scripts
items.description: Understand how to integrate Excel sheets with test scripts to use data-driven testing.

items.subTitle: Test Data Management
items.description: Use Excel sheets to manage input data for tests and store results.

items.subTitle: Looping Through Test Cases
items.description: Learn how to loop through rows in an Excel sheet to execute multiple test cases with different sets of input data.

items.subTitle: Keyboard Shortcuts
items.description: Learn common Excel shortcuts for faster navigation and data handling, such as Ctrl + C, Ctrl + V, Ctrl + Shift + L for filters, and Ctrl + Arrow keys to jump between sections.
